user.title: Neural Watt
user.description: Enter your Neural Watt API key. You can find it in your Neural Watt account dashboard.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Neural Watt
reauth_confirm.description: Your API key is no longer valid. Enter a new API key.

backfill_statistics.name: Backfill statistics
backfill_statistics.description: Fetches energy usage for a custom date range from the Neural Watt API and imports it as long-term statistics. Useful for backfilling history beyond the default 30-day window the coordinator fetches.
